timing_boundary: The inspected official commit is roughly three days after arXiv v1. It is later release evidence, not necessarily the exact paper-time implementation.
inspection_scope: Complete tracked tree inspected locally, including framework scripts, Docker adapters, six templates, five fictional examples, and documentation.
release_limit: The 94 production task packages, partner source requirements, task/refinement histories, benchmark outputs, score tables, and complete meta-evaluation labels are not present in this snapshot. The release supports framework/interface inspection, not reproduction of paper results or audit of production-task transformations.
